title: Now I Am a Witchling
overview: Doremi Harukaze comes across a magic shop and calls out the owner, Majorika, for being a witch, turning the latter into a witch frog. Now, she must become a witch apprentice herself to return Majorika to her normal self.

title: Being Dorie, Being Reanne
overview: Doremi and her best friend Hazuki Fujiwara want to swap lives for a day, as they both feel that the other is luckier. However, this leads to a few consequences.

title: The Spit Curl Girl
overview: A new girl named Aiko Senōō from Osaka transfers to Doremi's class and unintentionally upsets Doremi and Hazuki at first. Once Doremi gets to know her, she befriends her and tries to find ways to cheer her up on Parents' Day at school.

title: Dustin' the Old Rusty Broom
overview: Hazuki and Aiko find out Doremi's secret of being a witch apprentice after the stunt she pulls on Parents' Day, so they must also become witch apprentices to protect Doremi. The three girls redecorate the magic shop with a more cheerful design after Doremi accidentally destroys the shop.

title: Witch Conya of the Lunaverse
overview: After fixing up the magic shop and dubbing it Mahōdō, the girls await their first customers and are visited by a singing witch wholesaler Dela.

title: Believing Belinda
overview: Nobuko Yokokawa is a liar in the girls' class, but nevertheless amuses everyone with her imaginative stories. When Aiko believes in her and realizes she lied, she becomes very hurt.

title: Caitlyn's Day Out
overview: The three girls prepare to take their first witch exam, but Doremi must spend the day supervising her younger sister Pop. Pop wants to go to her grandparent's house by train by herself. When it comes to exam time, Hazuki and Aiko earn fairies for passing the exam. Doremi fails the exam, so she doesn't get a fairy.

title: Finally a Fairy!
overview: After failing to pass the level 9 exam, Doremi is given another chance. Her goal is to find medicine for Motamota. Luckily, Doremi passes and gets her fairy, but she does it with the help of Aiko and Hazuki, who come to see her out of worry.

title: A Runaway Fairy
overview: Doremi's fairy Dodo runs off after being scolded, so the girls use their new magic spell, Magical Stage, to try and find her.

title: Trouble in Store
overview: Miss Seki and the vice principal drop by the magic shop after photos of the girls working there arise.

title: You Don't Bring Me Flowers
overview: After being insulted by Takao Kimura, Marina Koizumi refuses to take care of the school's flowers. Hazuki is determined to help Marina realize Kimura is remorseful.

title: He Ain't Pelé, He's My Brother
overview: A young boy named Misaki Shibayama trades in his favorite shirt to get a charm to help his older brother Daichi play in a soccer game.

title: Parsley and Rosemary
overview: The girls take the Level 8 Exam in which they have three hours to clear three obstacles unknowingly chosen beforehand.

title: A Tall Order
overview: Majorika gets purchased by Pop. Pop treats Majorika like a plush toy and she takes her to school one day.

title: Patina Goes to Kindergarten
overview: Majorika gets purchased by Pop. Pop treats Majorika like a plush toy and she takes her to school one day.

title: Gone Fishin
overview: Doremi's father takes her and her friends on a fishing trip with a young boy who shares his passion.

title: Sketches of Pain
overview: Masaru Yada gets arrested, and no one else besides Hazuki and Miss Seki believes that he did nothing wrong. With Miss Seki's job on the line, Doremi, Hazuki and Aiko use their magic to find out if the rumors behind Yada are true.

title: The Flora Test
overview: After a fluke grants them immediate success on the Level 7 Exam, the girls find out that Nanako Okada refuses to take care of the school's rabbits and use their new powers to find out why. They learn that Nanako once lost her puppy and is afraid to have another pet because she thinks the same thing might happen.

title: Uncle Mick and His Sidekick
overview: On the last day without magic for breaking the laws of the Witch World, Hazuki is kidnapped by two conmen and only Doremi and Aiko can rescue her.

title: Get on the Bus
overview: Majorika loses her shop to Dela in a card game, and her arch-rival Majoruka takes over.

title: The Mystery Wind
overview: After noticing that the people around them are becoming ill due to Majoruka's charms, Aiko, Doremi, and Hazuki use their magic to break the spell.

title: We Need a Wandawhirl
overview: With the shop under enemy control, the girls must find a way to get in to take their Level 6 Exam.

title: Mirabelle's Blues
overview: After her father gives Aiko a new harmonica and decides to throw away the old, cherished one, she runs off to Hazuki's house. There, they find an extra magic bead, which they use to gain entrance to their exam.

title: Down in the Dumps
overview: The girls get a hold of Majoruka's crystal ball and are challenged to a magical duel for control of the shop.

title: The New Witch on the Block
overview: Pop is appointed as a witch apprentice after witnessing her sister and friends perform magic. She uses magic to create ghosts at her kindergarten sleepover, and Doremi, Hazuki, and Aiko help clean up her mess.

title: That Darn Evil Cat
overview: When returning the injured Kanae Īda to her father's steak shop, Doremi and the others discover the pall of bad luck covering the place and set out to uncover the mystery. They are appointed as Pureleine by the Queen to capture Bad Cards, as they have hearts pure enough to be able to do so.

title: You Ought Not to Be in Pictures
overview: The girls receive the Purelein Personal Computer from the Queen to capture the Bad Cards that exist in the Human World. Upon start-up, they are introduced to Oyajīde, the captive wizard who let loose the cards.

title: Love Serving Love
overview: Doremi comes across a cute tennis player named Yutaka Kashiwag at Hazuki's summer house and falls head over heels for him, but her snobby classmate Reika Tamaki also has an eye on him.

title: To Catch a Thief
overview: Doremi accidentally loses her tap at the Summer Festival.

title: I Want to See a Ghost!
overview: Doremi, Hazuki, Aiko, and their classmates head to Nobuaki Yamauchi's temple to share ghost stories and test their courage.

title: Careful What You Witch For
overview: Upon returning to school from summer vacation, the girls become interested in their classmate Shino Hanada's trip to Mongolia. At the same time, they are due to take the Level 5 Exam.

title: Scooter for President
overview: Masaharu Miyamoto, with the support of Doremi and her friends, challenges Tamaki's bid for class president.

title: Born to Run
overview: It's the day of the school's Sports Festival, but trouble begins to plague the events.

title: Mo' Mirabelle's Blues
overview: Aiko's mother comes to visit, but she is unable to face her daughter. Upon finding out, Aiko heads to her mother's house in Hannan City to meet her.

title: The Lyin' Witch and her Wardrobe
overview: The famous pop star and child actress Onpu Segawa becomes the new student in class. After a local audition, the girls find out that she is a witch apprentice under Majoruka.

title: Obstacle Schmob-stacle
overview: For the Level 4 Exam, the witch apprentices must race the Witch World's fastest hare and tortoise through an obstacle course.

title: The Lost Greenlings
overview: An intense storm in the Witch World blows a group of magic frogs into the Human World, and the girls must return them before anyone finds out.

title: Of Monsters and Witchlings
overview: Ryōta Hayashi is obsessed with monsters, specifically Gazamadon, and everyone scolds him for it. He becomes so upset, he puts all his monster goods away.

title: Skater Love
overview: When Maki Higuchi's brother in middle school, Shūzou Higuchi, sees Onpu in her witch apprentice outfit, she uses her magic to make him fall in love with someone else, which turns out to be Doremi.

title: The 3-Door Test
overview: The girls go to take the Level 3 Exam, hoping to pass so they can be granted each a seedling that eventually sprouts into a tree and yields an endless supply of magic spheres. Surprisingly, the exam is one they will have to take separately. They each must pass through a door into their own world to encounter a series of events that will test their own individual strengths and are only allowed to use magic twice. The girls also must also complete the exam in one hour or else they will fail.

title: There's No Business Like Shogi Business
overview: Shōta Taniyama loves the game shogi and is able to defeat the vice-principal, but his parents are against his desire to play. With the help of Miss Seki, they allow him to play in an upcoming tournament. Taniyama makes it to the final round but becomes nervous whenever he touches a certain piece. Doremi, Hazuki, and Aiko use this clue to identify the presence of a Bad Card.

title: Morph than a Feeling
overview: Kōta Amano, a boy obsessed with hero shows, is challenged to a fight by an upperclassman, who mistakenly believes he is dating Onpu.

title: Parental Guidance
overview: Tamaki decides to run away after thinking her father doesn't care because he never punishes her. She is accompanied by Shiori Nakayama, who has been out of school due to illness and also has problems with her father.

title: Candi Is Dandy
overview: Mutsumi Kudō, the strongest fighter in class, looks up to professional wrestler Candy Itō but becomes disappointed when she announces a possible retirement.

title: Saving Santa
overview: An ailing Santa Claus enlists the help of Doremi and the girls to deliver presents.

title: Just Like Magic
overview: The girls help Michiaki Watabe with his magic show when his father is unable to. For the Level 2 Exam, Doremi and friends are given the task of entertaining a group of witches at a talent show.

title: The Date Crasher
overview: Aiko's father's boss arranges a meeting with his daughter Midori for a possible marriage, but Aiko is not ready for another mother.

title: Geek Love
overview: Gōji Nakata becomes one of the many victims of a prank e-mail sent by Hehe asking for a date with Onpu.

title: Train a Comin
overview: Onpu's father, whom Onpu hasn't seen in six months, is conducting a new express train. So, she tries to get through her audition to meet him before he leaves again.

title: The Final Test
overview: The Level 1 Exam gives the girls the task of using magic to help someone and receiving thanks. However, things take a turn for the worse when their secret is discovered and spread around town.

title: The Hardest Test of All
overview: Onpu uses her magic to make everyone forget about what they discovered but is punished into a hundred-year sleep because of it. Doremi, Hazuki, and Aiko must decide if they will give up being witches to save their friend.

title: Doremi Becomes a Mama!?
overview: When Doremi, Hazuki, Aiko, and Onpu travel to the Witch World to visit Majo Rika, they inadvertently walk into the Queen's garden and encounter a baby born from a special rose. They are given their powers back and are asked to take care of the newborn for a year.

title: Raising a Baby is a Lot of Trouble!
overview: At the new Flower Garden MAHO Dou, the girls are both making preparations for the grand opening and taking care of Hana at the same time. Luckily, Doremi's mother comes by and properly instructs them on how to take care of Hana.

title: Doremi is a Failure as a Mama!?
Crushed Spirit and the Daisy Flower's Word
Crossover Time, Look for Onpu's Mama's Secret!
Look for the Herb! The Journey of the MAHO-Dou Bus
Senior High School Aiko is a "Running Girl"!?
Doremi Becomes a Bride?
overview: Sebastian Shinzou Osawa, son of one of the sponsors of Onpu's event, asks Doremi to marry him, to which she obviously accepts.

title: Poppu's First Love? The Admiration of Jiyunichi-sensei!
First Time Crawling!? The Harukaze House is in a Big Panic!
Hana-chan's Crawling Exam
overview: Conveniently enough, the third health examination challenges the baby's ability to crawl.

title: Doremi and Hazuki's Big Fight
overview: Doremi and Hazuki argue about how to properly take care of Hana, but any attempt of getting the two to make up only makes things worse.

title: I Can Meet Mother! Aiko's Tearful Reunion
overview: Aiko's mother invites her daughter to stay with her for the night, where she learns more about what led to the divorce.

title: The Human Hater Majodon and the Promise of the Herb
The Sorceror's Trap -- Oyajiide Has Returned
Using new powers to Rescue Hana-chan!
overview: After failing to get Hana from the clutches of Oyajiide, the Queen grants them access to more powerful magic to be used when the baby is in danger.

title: Fried Bread Power is Scary!
overview: Kotake and Kimura want to enter a sumo tournament to win a video game and get the fried bread-loving Susumu Yanagita to join them.

title: The Northern Country Herb and the Important Memory
Everyone Disappears During the Test of Courage!?
overview: Once again the class, this time with Tamaki, make a trip to Yamauchi's temple to test their courage.

title: The FLAT 4 From the Sorceror's Country Are Visiting!
Tondekepyuu! Dodo and the Others' Big Transformation
Takoyaki is the Way to Recover Taste
Aim for the Top in the Athletic Meet!
The Piano Comes to the Harukaze House!
overview: After the events of the Sharp movie, Pop asks her mother to teach her how to play the piano.

title: Onpu is Overtaken! The Road to Becoming an Idol!
The Witch That Doesn't Use Magic
Hana-chan is a Classmate!?
overview: Because Majo Rika and Lala are ill, the girls take Hana to school.

title: The Ojamajo Historical Play・The Girl Haboring Ambition!
The Final Physical Examination・Hana-chan's Mamas Protect Her!
Give Back Hana-chan! The Great Magic Battle
overview: It's the girls against Oyajiide and Ojijide as they race against the clock for the fate of the Witch and Wizard worlds and Hana.

title: Good-bye Hana-chan
overview: The four witch apprentices go in to the forest and retrieve the Love Supreme flower, however the previous queen tries to stop them. Doremi finally gets the flower and Hana is saved, but they fall asleep for 1000 years. Hana calls out to them, which awakens her mothers. When they saved Hana, their crystals break. They can't see Hana again because of this, and they part ways.

title: Momoko Cries!? Secret of the Earring
Big Fight! But We Would Like to Become Friends!
We Don't Want to Become Adults!
The Dream Boat That You Want!
Do I Love My Pretty Mother? Hate?
Nothing But Fights, Like Father, Like Son
Rock and Roll in the Music Club!?
Deliver Her Feelings! Aiko Goes to Osaka
All Sorts of Danger at the Witch Kindergarten!
Terror! The Curse of the Well
Please Give Us the Illusionary Recipe!
We’ll Cure It! Her Hatred of Vegetables
Undefeatable!? Ojamajo Lends a Helping Hand
I Want to Go to School!
School Arts Festival! Who's the Lead Part?
Hana-chan Becomes a 6th Grader!
overview: Hana begins sixth grade, but cannot read or write.

title: The Class Library's Combination is Missing!?
Hazuki's Shining Star
overview: Hadzuki feels that she and Yada are becoming distant as he becomes closer to Shiori.

title: Kyoto! Never-ending Night
overview: As the class settles in Kyoto, Kotake tries to protect Doremi from Akatsuki. Hana is turned back into a baby and the girls must hide her for the night.

title: Mutsumi's Retirement Announcement!
overview: Mutsumi wants to retire pro-wrestling after seeing her wrestling idol, Candy, retire.

title: Unpreparedness is the Greatest Enemy! Level 7 Exam
How to Make a Rainbow That Doesn't Disappear
overview: A rainy day helps Baba remember one of Majo Tourbillon's children. The rainbow that comes after gives the girls an idea for removing a bramble from the Past Queen.

title: Where There Are Woofs, There Is Love
Love and Justice! We Are the Majo Rangers!
They Can Create Smiles? The Mysterious Glass Cups
Heating up With Camping and Curry!?
overview: The 6th grade goes on a camping trip. During a scavenger hunt, Doremi and Kotake get lost.

title: Nice to Meet You, White Elephant!
Don’t Let Go! Our Connecting Hands
A Suspicious Shadow!? The Chest of the Witch World
The Level 4 exam is Lo, Lo, Lo, Lo?
The Bicycle That Goes Any Where
Finally a Second Marriage!? Aiko’s Decision
Doremi and the Witch Stop Being Witches
Pop Becomes a Witch Early On!?
I Have to Decide!? Hazuki’s Road
The Level 1 Exam! Tamaki's Desperate Situation!!
overview: Tamaki falls under the virus of the Witch Queen. Hana decides to cure her for her Level 1 exam.

title: Farewell, The Curse of the Witch-Frogs!
Even If You Go Far Away
overview: As Onpu is accepted into a different middle school, Momoko is given the choice to move back to New York or stay in Japan.

title: Aiko's Number One Happy Day
overview: Aiko goes to Osaka to help take care of her grandfather at the hospital. Her parents make the decision to take care of him at home, and as a result, decide to move back to Osaka.

title: Forever Forever, Friends
overview: Hazuki secretly wants to apply to her dream school, but becomes conflicted over choosing her desires over staying with Doremi.

title: Thank You! Until We Meet Again
overview: On the day of graduation, Doremi refuses to attend school in fear of losing her friends forever. So she locks her self up in the Maho-Dou. Hana threatens to use magic, and Doremi comes out just in time before she shows everyone. In the end, after graduation, the girls send off Hana-chan, Majo Rika and the fairies with Hana promising to become the Queen fast so the can see each other again. Hana turns back into a baby when she enters the witch world. Doremi calls out to her and Hana-Chan turns around and says, "Thank you." While the theme for the original Ojamajo Doremi is played they show Momo-Chan and her parents in the airport while she says "See you. You are my best friend. I love you.(In english)" Onpu is shown with her parents in front of their car. Aiko is shown with her parents getting on the train. Hazuki is shown with Pop and (Doremi's) parents is Doremi's house. In the witch world Hana and the other babies are shown laying on Pao.

title: Messed Up Cycling ~The Boys' Secret~
overview: Kotake and a group of boys decide to bicycle to Mount Fuji. Doremi, Hazuki, and Aiko have to convince him otherwise.

title: New York's MAHO Dou ~Momoko's Secret~
overview: Momoko meets Onpu at New York and tells a story of what happened before she became a witch apprentice.

title: The Value of Swimming! ~Aiko's Secret~
overview: The swim meet is nearing and Aiko has been chosen as Anchor for her class. There's only one problem, though...

title: Non-standard ~Onpu's Secret~
overview: Onpu cannot decide on a role for a movie and she reflects on what made her become an idol.

title: Someone Who Knows the Sorrow ~Pop and Hana's Secret~
overview: The trouble with Hana is that she isn't potty-trained.

title: Sugar Candy Memory ~Baaya's Secret~
overview: When Baaya was younger, she fell in love at first sight with two things. The first was ballet, the other a boy.

title: I Love Taiyaki! ~The Parent and Child's Secret~
overview: The son of a Taiyaki maker is fed up with his father criticizing him, and goes to the Maho-do to start his business.

title: Recorder Test! ~The Honor Student's Secret~
overview: When a flute is broken by an honor student with a crush, Onpu takes the blame.

title: Baseball Club ~The Witches' Secret~
overview: Momoko, inspired by two baseball lovers, makes a team of her own friends and they compete with their first team...

title: Wedding Promise ~Childhood Friends' Secret~
overview: Aiko reunites with Anrima, who made a promise to her when she was younger.

title: Valentine's Day ~Hazuki's Secret~
overview: Once upon a time; every Valentine's Day, Hazuki and Masaru swap gifts. There's a reason why they stopped.

title: The Seventh Witch Apprentice ~Non-chan's Secret~
overview: Doremi meets a girl named Nozomi in the hospital, who is a fan of witches. She vowed to her, despite her Cancer, that she would become a Witch Apprentice.

title: The Doll That Leapt Through Time ~Doremi's Secret~
overview: Doremi meets a mysterious girl named Fami, who shares similar traits with her.
